description:
A patient taking the cancer drug Mercaptopurine is experiencing gout flare-ups. Check the safety of two potential treatments: Allopurinol and Colchicine. Open the Liverpool Cancer iChart app, navigate to Mercaptopurine in the Cancer Drugs list, check the interaction traffic light color for Allopurinol, then check the interaction traffic light color for Colchicine. Create a text file at /sdcard/gout_safety_check.txt with the format:
Mercaptopurine + Allopurinol: [COLOR]
Mercaptopurine + Colchicine: [COLOR]
Recommendation: Use [SAFER_DRUG]
